name: S6: Cardiorenal Cascade — Baseline Characterization
description: Baseline covariate profile comparison between new prediabetes patients and matched controls. Evaluates demographic, clinical, and pharmacological balance for the Cardiorenal-Metabolic Cascade study.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization comparing prediabetes target cohort vs matched controls across demographics, conditions, drugs, measurements, procedures, and visits in the 365 days prior to index.
